name: Meat and Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. About 1 1/2 hours before serving, combine ground beef, bread crumbs, allspice, nutmeg, pepper and 1 teaspoon salt by hand.
2. Press the mixture to the bottom and side of a 9-inch pie plate just to the rim. Refrigerate.
3. In a large bowl, using a potato masher, mix sweet potatoes with remaining ingredients and 1/2 teaspoon salt until smooth.
4. Spoon the sweet potato mixture into the pie shell, spreading evenly to seal the edge.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 50 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Makes 6 servings.
